bodyHtml:
Your active investigations

What you're tracking right now. Each has a resolution criterion; when an investigation resolves, state the answer plainly in your output and the goal will be updated.

  1. [g_5ec36605191d4608] thesis: 张江产业园REIT是否失去类债防守属性 - Hypothesis: 生物医药融资收紧与地缘管制导致生命科学租户K型分化，张江产业园类REIT的租金和分红收益率存在约15%-34%下行压力，重压情形下分红收益率可能探底至3.92%。 - Resolves when: Resolved when the next disclosed leasing and distribution data either confirm material stress through weaker renewals, higher vacancy, rent cuts, and distribution yield moving toward the stressed 3.92% case, or show renewals/rents/distributions remain resilient enough to reject the 15-34% downside estimate. - Linked entities: 张江REIT, 张江产业园, 生命科学地产, 生物医药租户, CDMO - Last progress: today

  2. [g_59377664a3e34dfe] tracking: 竣工和销售下行是否扩散到制造及特化库存开工 - Resolves when: Resolved when downstream order books, inventory days, and operating rates across the tracked manufacturing and specialty-chemical segments either show two consecutive quarters of deterioration attributable to property completion/sales weakness, or stabilize/improve despite continued property weakness, showing the trans - Linked entities: 消费建材, 特种化学品, 下游制造, 房地产竣工, 房地产销售 - Last progress: today

  3. [g_fa38844457a44ad9] open_question: AI电力地产链的硬瓶颈是否仍是审批与接网 - Resolves when: Resolved when observed project data show either sustained normalization of approval/interconnection wait times and fees sufficient for green-power cost savings to flow through to project returns, or continued connection delays/fees large enough to offset the green-power price advantage and impair deployed or idle AI se - Linked entities: AI数据中心, 电网公司, 输电REITs, GPU服务器 - Last progress: today

  4. [g_561b20a29fdd45fe] thesis: 民混房企一年现金缺口决定公开债风险边界 - Hypothesis: 系统性地产违约潮不是基准情形，但弱二三线及无兜底民混房企的主体层面现金缺口会突破行政展期承载，新增公开债展期/违约上限约为人民币800亿-1,200亿元。 - Resolves when: Resolved on or before 2027-06-30 when cumulative new public-bond extensions/defaults by the tracked private and mixed-ownership developers either fall within/above the RMB 80-120bn stress range, confirming cash-gap transmission, or remain materially below that range because refinancing, collateral support, or administr - Linked entities: 万科, 民营房企, 混合所有制房企, 弱二三线房企, 评级机构, 银团银行 - Last progress: today

  5. [g_fdb703ac71f343c8] thesis: 家装链从新房beta切换到存量翻新/出海 - Hypothesis: 家装主驱动已由新房竣工beta转向存量房翻新、以旧换新补贴和出海；超额收益集中在零售化、现金创造强、低房企应收的细分龙头，而工程重和补贴排除品类是陷阱。 - Resolves when: Resolved when two consecutive reporting periods show either (a) tracked names' renovation/export-driven orders and operating cash flow both improve despite continued weak completions, confirming the thesis, or (b) orders or operating cash flow fail to improve after subsidy/export channels remain available, invalidating - Linked entities: 兔宝宝, 三棵树, 北新建材, 伟星新材, 好太太, 富森美, 坚朗五金 - Research project: rp_0f8a8b0d99ed46d3 - Last progress: 1 day ago

  6. [g_4c9c2d9974d54b56] open_question: 收储去库三约束能否真实落地 - Resolves when: Resolved when final implementation rules and first material transactions either explicitly establish central loss-bearing/funding, acquisition discounts deep enough to avoid subsidizing developers, and enforceable new-supply controls, or when executed deals proceed without these three constraints and show the policy ca - Linked entities: 中央财政, 地方政府, 保障房收储, 房地产开发商 - Last progress: 1 day ago
